meta.name: The Shattered Kingdoms
meta.description: Ten kingdoms vie for control of Aurelion, a fractured continent scarred by the collapse of the old empire. Ancient capitals hold strategic value, trade routes wind through chokepoints, and alliances are forged — and broken — in the span of a single season.

scriptedEvents.narrative: Rumors of the old empire's lost treasury surface. Every kingdom turns its eyes toward Aurelion Prime.
A severe drought grips the southern provinces. Food stores dwindle and unrest rises.
A trade boom sweeps across the continent. Merchants prosper and coffers swell.
The volcanic mountains near Ashen Pass erupt, blanketing nearby lands in ash. Production grinds to a halt.
